lag_issues.title: Lag spike — MSPT 118ms · TPS 8.4
lag_issues.narrative: MSPT hit 118ms with TPS 8.4 and 4 players online. World pregen was active. Last command: /chunky continue.
hints: 4 players online — lag may be player-driven (entities, chunk loading)
World pregen running — competes with tick time; consider pausing during peak hours
Entity count elevated (1247) — check farms / mob caps

hints: Check Mods → Log errors for details and sample lines.
fix_steps: Find the contraption controller block and break it to stop the assembly.
Reduce stress or split the contraption into smaller sections.

mod_issues.title: ae2 — 6 log errors (recipe compat)
mod_issues.narrative: Applied Energistics 2 logged recipe compatibility errors after the pack update.
hints: New AE2 jar was added since the last report — verify KubeJS recipes reference valid tags.
fix_steps: Open scripts that reference AE2 items and confirm IDs match 19.2.x.
Run /reload and watch for ae2 recipe warnings in latest.log.
